team owners to force delivery will
undoubtedly lead to a spread of the
strike. No violence of any kind was
reported up to noon.


President Shea of the Transfers
union today telegraphed President
Gompers of the American Federation
of Labor arranging for a meeting of
the national board of that body to be
held in Chicago the end of the week.
The report that Shea wired the ma
tional officers of the transfers broth
erhood to come to Chicago is also con-
firmed. The transfers board will be
in session about Wednesday, This
move is regarded as indicating
probable strike settlement.


President Gompers of the American
Federation of Labor at Washington
today issued call to all organized
labor for funds to support the team
